title: Harness Config Manifest
description: Describes which AI coding harnesses are active for a project, their config file paths, the project lifecycle stage, and the rules document to generate. Used for drift detection and onboarding automation.

version.description: Semver version of this manifest schema. Increment on breaking changes to enable drift detection.

lifecycle_stage.description: Project maturity stage. Controls which generation rules and defaults are applied.

harnesses.description: List of AI coding harnesses configured for this project.

language.description: Primary programming language of the project.

rules_file.description: Path (relative to project root) to the generated harness-agnostic patterns document.
